text.title: User Research at Scale Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of User Research at Scale. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Weekly codes grew from 80 to 240 in 3 weeks; comparability lost.
antipattern.fix: Freeze book; route novelty to proposed_codes; require HITL accept before merge.
Enforce evidence_count>=50, session_count>=10, segment_count>=2 at publish.
Route through ZDR-eligible endpoints; lint outbound calls.

antipattern.symptom: Same note appears 3x in Dovetail after retries.
antipattern.fix: Hash (source_url + date) as idempotency key; reject duplicates.
